# Lucen — full content for AI ingestion
# This file is an expanded, machine-friendly version of llms.txt.

See https://lucen-holo-flow.lovable.app/llms.txt for the canonical index.

## About Lucen

Lucen designs and operates a real-time holographic interface system. Each Lucen
installation combines transparent LED, anamorphic, volumetric or projection
hardware with the Lucen Engine — a live analytics layer that measures dwell
time, attention seconds, and conversion lift for every screen on the network.

## Contact

- Email: holograms@lucene.co
- Phone: +254 727 750 097
- Hours: Mon–Fri, 8 AM – 6 PM EAT
- Web: https://lucen-holo-flow.lovable.app/contact

## Capabilities (one-liners)

- Hardware: transparent LED, anamorphic, volumetric, fan, pepper's-ghost, projection
- Software: Lucen Engine — live dwell, attention, conversion analytics
- Services: site survey, content design, fabrication, install, network operation
- Models: purchase, long-term rental, short-term rental, campaign, DOOH analytics

## Industries

retail, real-estate, automotive, hospitality, events, trade-shows, corporate,
DOOH, transit, museums.

## Brand

- Name: Lucen (legacy email domain lucene.co)
- Tagline: A real-time holographic interface where media, motion, and light form a continuous intelligent system.
- Tone: precision, restraint, cinematic.
